top_signals.title: Oil Erases Wartime Gains as More Tankers Transit Hormuz
top_signals.summary: Oil’s wartime price gains have evaporated as the US and Iran log progress in peace talks and more tankers openly transit the Strait of Hormuz, easing fears of a supply crunch.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Waller, Welcoming Remarks on the International Role of the U.S. Dollar

top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Indian auto giant Bajaj Auto hit by ransomware incident
top_signals.summary: The company said in a regulatory filing that it became aware of the incident on Tuesday morning and had taken precautionary measures to contain its impact.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Wintermar Takes Full Control of Fast Offshore Supply
top_signals.summary: Indonesian offshore vessel operator PT Wintermar Offshore Marine (WINS) has acquired the remaining stakes in Singapore-based Fast Offshore Supply (FOS) and its subsidiary PT Fast Offshore Indonesia (FOI), gaining full control of both companies…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
